title: Unbreakable Give
description: UnbreakableGive is a simple plugin that lets players receive unbreakable items/blocks instantly through easy commands. It’s lightweight, lag-free, beginner-friendly, and works smoothly on modern Minecraft servers with permission control for safe usage.
body: UnbreakableGive is a clean, lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to give players unbreakable items/blocks instantly and reliably. Whether you run a survival, PvP, or custom gameplay server, this plugin removes the hassle of durability management by converting any item into an unbreakable version with a single command. It is optimized for performance, ensuring zero lag and smooth operation even on busy servers. With simple setup and no complicated configuration files, server owners can plug it in and start using it immediately. UnbreakableGive is compatible with modern Paper and Spigot versions, supports permission-based control, and ensures that only authorized players can access unbreakable items. Its simplicity makes it perfect for beginners, while its stability and speed make it ideal for advanced server environments. The plugin is built to be reliable, cleanly coded, and future-ready for long-term server use.
